algorithm: longest cycle of a random permutation
conjectured_mean_closed_form: → λ ≈ 0.62433 (Golomb–Dickman) — the longest cycle covers ~62% of the elements on average
certificate: exact E[longest cycle]/n by enumeration: n=1: E[max]/n=1.0000; n=2: E[max]/n=0.7500; n=3: E[max]/n=0.7222; n=4: E[max]/n=0.6979; n=5: E[max]/n=0.6850; n=6: E[max]/n=0.6738; n=7: E[max]/n=0.6679; n=8: E[max]/n=0.6620
